app_topics: the material, component and element composition of products (e.g. end-of-life vehicles) via the query-optimized fq: dataset
example_questions: How much copper is in V0301030105?
Which elements does elvBEV contain, and in what amounts?
How much aluminium is in the elvEVbattery?
What does V0301030105 contain at the Component level?
List all classes that contain Copper.
How much of each element is in the elvElectricMotor?

endpoints.label: FutuRaM (ELV fleet)
endpoints.description: Real ELV end-of-life-vehicle fleet data across 6 drivetrains (elvBEV, elvDiesel, elvHEV, elvPHEV, elvPetrol, elvOther), 1980-2050, as the query-optimized fq: dataset. Ask 'how much of <constituent> is in <class>' via the fq:contains pattern; declare the constituent KIND via the ontology: '?e rdfs:subClassOf futuram:Element' (or Component/Material). The unattributed remainder of every whole is a first-class futuram:unknown* constituent row, so each level's amounts sum to 1.0.
